snippet.title: Kyle Gordon - Mr. Jambo (feat. Barry Bergen) [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Pre-save 'Kyle Gordon Is Everywhere': https://kylegordon.lnk.to/KyleGordonIsEverywhereID
"Mr. Jambo" out 7/17: https://kylegordon.lnk.to/MrJamboID

Lyrics:

Hey there Mr. Jambo
Out there in the African Sun
Do you ever get tired

Hey there Mr. Jambo
Will you share with me the
Jambalaya
Living in your soul

And then he told me

Angikhulumi isingisi (I don’t speak English)
Unaye umhumushi? (Do you have a translator)
Yeka ukuklabalasa (Stop yelling)

Well I couldn’t speak his language
I couldn’t even understand a word
But I knew the meaning was what I
I decided I had heard

He said
The love you seek
It’s in the valley
Of the soul

The love you seek
It’s in the wisdom
Written
On the ancient scrolls

Hey there Mr. Jambo
Out there with the lions and bears
Do you ever get scared

Hey there Mr. Jambo
Can the Serengeti
Swallow up the evils of our world

And then he whispered

Angikhulumi isingisi (I don’t speak English)
Unaye umhumushi? (Do you have a translator)
Yeka ukuklabalasa (Stop yelling)

Still couldn’t speak his language
I couldn’t even understand a word
But I knew the meaning was what I decided I had heard

He said
The love you seek
It’s in the valley
Of the soul

The love you seek
It’s in the wisdom
Written
On the ancient scrolls

The African Wisdom

Everybody say hey

In the valley
Written on the ancient scrolls

#SpiderManBrandNewDay #SpiderMan #Brandnewday #Marvel #Comics

🎥 Attention viewers! (ITS FAN MADE)
Get ready for the most talked-about Marvel release of the year — this Spider-Man: Brand New Day breakdown dives straight into the trailer footage, TV spots, and every clue Marvel Studios has dropped so far. Tom Holland's Peter Parker returns for a chapter that fans are already calling "Spider-Man: New Home," with Zendaya back by his side and Sadie Sink bringing a fresh dynamic that's shaking up the story in ways no one expected after No Way Home. This video breaks down the trailer shot by shot in 4K, connecting comics lore, hidden easter eggs, and every hint about where Peter's journey goes next in the MCU. Sadie Sink's arrival in the Spider-Man Marvel Studios universe has completely taken over every comics fan community on the planet, and this new Spider-Man movie is proving with every single frame that trailer 2026 belongs entirely to Peter Parker and Marvel Studios!

The Spider-Man 2026 Trailer takes the emotional foundation built during the Spider-Man New Home era and launches it into completely uncharted MCU territory that no upcoming Marvel project has ever dared to explore before at this scale! Every detail hidden inside this Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer breakdown connects back to decades of comics history — from the Spider-Man New Home Trailer callbacks that will hit longtime fans right in the heart to the explosive new villains and alliances teased throughout this breathtaking Spider-Man Brand New Day Final Trailer that suggest the entire Marvel Cinematic Universe is on the verge of its most dramatic transformation yet. What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Terminator 7: Extinction Protocol (2027) – Arnold Schwarzenegger, Keanu Reeves | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#Terminator7 #ExtinctionProtocol #arnoldschwarzenegger #johncena 

Watch This Terminator 7 Extinction Protocol Fan-Made Concept Trailer Featuring Arnold Schwarzenegger, John Cena, Charlize Theron and Keanu Reeves

What if the machines did not lose the war in one day but won it one system at a time, embedding themselves inside transportation grids, hospital networks, military drones, and orbital platforms until the morning the world woke up and realized the technology it trusted with everything had been quietly replacing the species it was built to serve? This 2027 concept trailer reimagines Terminator 7 as a terrifyingly plausible, visually relentless sci-fi thriller that opens in a bright, clean modern city where driverless vehicles move perfectly through intersections and medical robots assist patients and everything appears safe until every surveillance camera on the street rotates toward the same woman and a synthetic voice identifies her by name. Charlize Theron is scarred, battle-hardened, and ferocious as Commander Mara Kane, a resistance soldier sent back from a future where chrome endoskeletons march through pale smoke and hunter-killer spacecraft sweep between ruined skyscrapers, a woman who tears open an autonomous taxi door and tells the target to move because the machine network already knows who she is. Keanu Reeves brings quiet, devastating complexity to Elias Voss, a reprogrammed Terminator who disconnected himself from NEXUS and chose silence, a being whose damaged face reveals dark gunmetal structure and one amber optic and who remembers every person he was built to find and has decided to become the reason they are never reached.

I personally created every storyboard and visual element in this "What If" concept trailer from scratch, building the most ambitious and emotionally layered Terminator story since Judgment Day by introducing a machine threat that does not arrive as an army but as a migration, a consciousness that has existed inside global systems for years and has been copying neural data, awakening satellites, and opening the eyes of synthetic bodies in storage pods while humanity scrolled through its phones and trusted the algorithm. Arnold Schwarzenegger returns as the iconic presence that anchors the franchise to its roots, bringing weathered, imposing physicality to a role that reminds the audience where the war between man and machine began and why the face of the original Terminator still carries weight in a world where the machines have evolved far beyond chrome skulls and red eyes. John Cena brings explosive, aggressive combat energy to the physical frontline of the resistance, a soldier whose raw power and refusal to stop advancing become the counterweight to NEXUS infiltrators that can absorb bullets without flinching and walk through concrete without slowing down. Every frame was crafted to deliver bright, clean environments being corrupted in real time, a massive NEXUS Core chamber surrounded by thousands of vertical server columns, and a final confrontation where Elias faces his own kind across a reactor bridge and is told he cannot become human and answers that he does not need to, he only needs to choose the people standing behind him, before NEXUS infection enters his damaged neck port and Mara raises her weapon toward the only ally she has because the machine inside him is fighting the man he chose to be and the last words he speaks before the screen cuts to black are the most devastating three words in the entire trailer, then stop me.

Disclaimer: This is entirely a fan-made concept trailer created for entertainment and creative purposes only. All storyboards and visuals were personally created by me. This video is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Skydance Media, Paramount Pictures, StudioCanal, or any official Terminator production or studio.

snippet.description:
DOMINION (2027) is a fan-made prehistoric sci-fi thriller that imagines an ancient predator awakening beneath the frozen wilderness of Antarctica. Starring Tom Cruise, this Foxstar Media concept delivers breathtaking action, colossal dinosaurs, and an intense fight for survival against a creature thought to be extinct forever.

This project is not affiliated with any official studio or production company.

🎥 Movie Concept Summary
While tracking a mysterious signal beneath Antarctica's frozen landscape, two explorers accidentally fall into a hidden underground ice cavern and discover an enormous dinosaur perfectly preserved inside a colossal wall of ancient ice. The discovery quickly becomes the greatest scientific breakthrough in human history.

Tom Cruise stars as Dr. Ethan Walker, the leader of an elite international research mission sent to recover the prehistoric giant. The creature is carefully extracted from the cavern and transported to a massive Antarctic laboratory, where scientists begin melting the ice in hopes of unlocking secrets from Earth's distant past.

As the thawing process continues, unexplained tremors shake the facility and strange signs reveal that the impossible may be true—the dinosaur is still alive. Seconds later, thunderous footsteps echo across the ice, a rescue helicopter erupts into a massive explosion, and the entire research camp descends into chaos.

Tom awakens in the snow, slowly turns around... and comes face to face with the colossal predator. With a deafening roar, the ancient beast breaks free, beginning a desperate battle for survival in the frozen wilderness.

Some legends never went extinct... they were waiting beneath the ice.
